bottleneck.evidence: Final evaluate.py repeat=3 shows the reference/fallback path near 155-163 us while direct-buffer two-kernel quantization is near 78-81 us; profile.py also reported only ~1.1% HBM at M=1024, so avoidable launches/copies dominated rather than memory bandwidth.

approaches.summary: Tried enabling the existing SGLang DSV4 swizzle specialization for the contiguous activation kernel.
approaches.why: The swizzled DSV4 kernel requires a different scale tensor layout and rejected the task buffer with a TensorMatcher stride/size error.

approaches.summary: Called sgl_per_token_group_quant_8bit with fuse_silu_and_mul=True, first directly and then with a column-major packed-scale view.
approaches.why: The fused v2 quant kernel uses a different SwiGLU convention/rounding path and failed the 0.999 matched-ratio tolerance despite close cosine similarity.

approaches.summary: Preserved the reference fallback math with sgl_kernel.silu_and_mul followed by sgl_per_token_group_quant_8bit, but wrote quantized FP8 directly into out_fp8 and only copied the packed scale view back to out_scale.
approaches.why: Avoiding the high-level quant wrapper allocation and q.copy_ removes an extra device copy while keeping exact FP8 payload and packed UE8M0 scale semantics.

lesson: For GLM-style contiguous SwiGLU+FP8 tasks where DSV4 rejects the raw row-major packed scale buffer, keep the proven two-stage fallback math but write quantization directly into the provided output tensor. The high-level sglang_per_token_group_quant_fp8 helper may hide an extra allocation and copy that costs about half the runtime on B200 for this sweep.
transfers_to: swiglu-fp8-quant prefill tasks with contiguous gate/up input and packed UE8M0 scales
B200 sm_100 activation+quant workloads where the reference falls back from DSV4 to sgl_kernel helpers
caveats: The sgl_kernel fused SwiGLU quant path was not numerically equivalent here
integrate.py failed in its FP8 comparison path because torch.isinf is not implemented for Float8_e4m3fn, so drop-in verification could not complete without harness changes
